chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No. 313 of 2013 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing 1. For order on CMA No.180/2026 2. For hearing of Main Case 2. For hearing of CMA No.1999/2013 26.01.2026 Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the applicant Mr. Muhammad Arif Khan, advocate for respondent 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Learned counsel for the applicant under instructions does not wish to press this Reference Application, which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ashraf
